text_block_list.text: On the way back home with Nice Nature...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Hey... Since we still have some time... do you want
to go check out some fish?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
The lady at the fish store told me to bring you
sometime.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Great. Shall we, then?

I follow her, thinking maybe she has her eye on a
particular fish she wants to buy, but...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, look at them go! These tasty-looking fish
sure know how to swim.
choice_data_list: I wasn't expecting to come to an aquarium.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Trust me, I get it! You're probably thinking, "Huh,
what was up with the way she invited me?" Right?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
That's just good ol' Nature for you. I can't really
do things the cutesy way.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
After the lady at the fish shop went through the
trouble of giving me the tickets for us to relax, I
had to get you here somehow...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I really didn't mean to trick you or anything, I
swear.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Well, I'll be... Who's this cool cucumber over
here? You sure are taking this in stride.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Well, that's good. I'm glad you're not upset.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, I don't know if it'll make up for it, but...
let's see what you want to see today!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
It looks like they have a lot of interesting stuff
going on here. Can't go wrong with everyone's
go-to da—I mean, hangout spot.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
The jellyfish exhibit, stingrays, snappers... They
all looked so tasty.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Oh, how about we go and see the dolphin show?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
...Actually, I bet you don't want to see cutesy
things like that with me.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Well, I'll leave it up to you! What do you want to
go see?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Um... Were you listening?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Okay, I get it, but are you saying that because you want to do it, or...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
No, never mind... I guess I did say we'd see
whatever you want to see.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Fine. If that'll help you relax, then let's do it.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I hope you understand I won't be doing any
cutesy screams, though.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Wow, look at how lively that dolphin is! Wait...
Water! It's coming this way!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Gyaaaargh!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Drat... That splash was way bigger than I
expected.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I didn't expect the dolphin show to be a
near-death experience...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Geez... Not only did I end up screaming, it was
more of a yowl.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Heh... I guess it was, wasn't it? Maybe places like
this are my thing, after all.

Nice Nature and I have a great time at the
aquarium, and we both leave feeling fully
refreshed.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Oh, that sounds exciting!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
It says "spookiest." I wonder how scary these fish
can be...

We move on to the exhibit area. After looking
around myself, I glance over at Nature to see her
reaction.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: So...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: So adooorable!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Awww! Look at their little eyes! And they're called
flapjack octopi!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Ooh!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
C-come on, this is false advertising! No way you
could call cuties like this "spooky."

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Oooh... They're too adorable.
choice_data_list: Hey, that one over there is pretty cute too...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: You're right! It's kinda ugly, but in a cute way!

Nice Nature and I have a great time at the
aquarium, and we both leave feeling fully
refreshed.
